description: Entra ID built-in roles classified as privileged by Microsoft. These roles are marked with the Privileged label icon in the Microsoft Entra admin center and grant significant directory-level access.

roles.name: Global Administrator
roles.reason: Full access to all administrative features in Entra ID and services that use Entra identities

roles.name: Privileged Role Administrator
roles.reason: Can manage role assignments for all Entra ID roles including Global Administrator

roles.name: Privileged Authentication Administrator
roles.reason: Can set or reset any authentication method for any user, including Global Administrators

roles.name: Global Reader
roles.reason: Can read everything that a Global Administrator can, exposing sensitive configuration data

roles.name: Security Administrator
roles.reason: Can manage security features, read security reports, and manage Conditional Access policies

roles.name: Conditional Access Administrator
roles.reason: Can manage Conditional Access policies which control access to all resources

roles.name: Exchange Administrator
roles.reason: Full access to Exchange Online including mailbox access and mail flow rules

roles.name: SharePoint Administrator
roles.reason: Full access to SharePoint Online including all site collections and settings

roles.name: User Administrator
roles.reason: Can manage all aspects of users and groups, including resetting passwords for limited admins

roles.name: Application Administrator
roles.reason: Can manage all aspects of app registrations and enterprise apps, including credentials

roles.name: Cloud Application Administrator
roles.reason: Similar to Application Administrator but cannot manage application proxy

roles.name: Authentication Administrator
roles.reason: Can set or reset authentication methods for some non-admin users

roles.name: Helpdesk Administrator
roles.reason: Can reset passwords for non-administrators and Helpdesk Administrators

roles.name: Intune Administrator
roles.reason: Full access to Microsoft Intune including device and policy management
